task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Rate-Limited API** (Level 7)

Build any CRUD API with rate limiting. POST /api/items creates items (name required). GET /api/items lists all. Apply rate limiting: max 5 requests per minute. The 6th request within a minute should return 429.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Items table:
  name, required

# Your endpoints here
# Hint: rate limit 5 per minute

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/items with body {"name
final_source:
build for javascript backend
database is local memory

create a Items table:
  name, required

create a RequestLog table:
  timestamp

when user calls POST /api/items sending entry:
  # Check rate limit (max 5 per minute)
  one_minute_ago = current time minus 60 seconds
  recent_requests = get all RequestLog where timestamp is greater than one_minute_ago
  
  if length of recent_requests is greater than or equal to 5:
    send back 'Rate limited' with status 429
  
  # Validate the item
  validate entry:
    name is text, required
  
  # Log this request
  now = current time
  log_data = {}
  log_data's timestamp = now
  log_record = save log_data to RequestLog
  
  # Create the item
  saved = save entry to Items
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/items:
  # Check rate limit (max 5 per minute)
  one_minute_ago = current time minus 60 seconds
  recent_requests = get all RequestLog where timestamp is greater than one_minute_ago
  
  if length of recent_requests is greater than or equal to 5:
    send back 'Rate limited' with status 429
  
  # Log this request
  now = current time
  log_data = {}
  log_data's timestamp = now
  log_record = save log_data to RequestLog
  
  items = get all Items
  send back items
